title: Asymptotic Analysis of Second Order Nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard-Type   Functionals
summary:
In this paper the study of a nonlocal second order Cahn-Hilliard-type
singularly perturbed family of functions is undertaken. The kernels considered
include those leading to Gagliardo fractional seminorms for gradients. Using
Gamma convergence the integral representation of the limit energy is
characterized leading to an anisotropic surface energy on interfaces separating
different phases.
